alignments.wiki_text: --ever know, knew, and ever will know if he signed the dotted line to fight George Foreman. Now, lemme say this: I discovered when Tyson fought Bonecrusher Smith, that he didn't have what people thought he had.
alignments.proposed_text: --ever know, knew, and ever will know if he signed the dotted line to fight George Foreman. Now, lemme say this: I discovered when Tyson fought Bonecrusher Smith, that he didn't have what people thought he had.
